message:
test: add full-pipeline integration tests and fix is_system_path veto bug

Add 13 pipeline integration tests covering: pressure escalation, ballast
lifecycle, walker traversal, scoring pipeline, dry-run deletion, EWMA
predictive pipeline, notifications, config roundtrip, pattern registry,
protection markers, and batch scoring.

Fix is_system_path() which previously vetoed ALL absolute paths because
it checked path.starts_with("/") — now only checks specific system dirs.

Update stale CLI smoke tests for evolved subcommand implementations.

Closes bd-21z.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
